Argument.name: event
Argument.Description: select Event-1(Create DIsabled Accounts) and Event-2(Enable Accounts)

Argument.name: fromDate
Argument.Description: select dates (from) on which selected event triggered

Argument.name: toDate
Argument.Description: select dates (to) on which selected event triggered

Argument.name: department
Argument.Description: to filter identities only from specific department
